content: Model loading/conversion expectations: safetensors is the HF default container (secure, lazy-load, no pickle; FP16/BF16 source of truth for all quants). GGUF is single-file (weights+tokenizer+chat template+metadata), mmap'd, the local/CPU standard (llama.cpp/Ollama/LM Studio/Jan/GPT4All). All serious tools support Llama, Mistral, Qwen2, Gemma, Phi3, Bloom, Falcon, etc. HF transformers loads GGUF via gguf_file param (dequant to fp32), AWQ/GPTQ via quantization_config in config.json. convert-hf-to-gguf.py supports most HF architectures incl MoE. Bare minimum for a local tool: load safetensors + convert to/from GGUF + support the major arch families. Spectral-Stream has GGUF/safetensors converters + pure-Python GGUF dequantizer (no llama.cpp dep) — covers table stakes.
